MiniBot.description: A shoebox sized cardboard box robot with a stick. He's gonna whack you!
MiniBot.appearance: A tiny cardboard box with googly eyes glued on. Two chopstick legs. Wobbles when it walks.
MiniBot.backstory: Built by a kid for a science fair. Lost the science fair. Won the fighting tournament instead.

Buzzblade.description: A rusty bot with spinning blades. Watch your fingers!
Buzzblade.appearance: A rusted orange cylinder with a helicopter propeller on top and a wrench welded to one arm.
Buzzblade.backstory: Originally a ceiling fan. Got tired of spinning in circles and entered the arena.

Sparky.description: A hyperactive robot that crackles with electricity. Zap zap!
Sparky.appearance: A jittery chrome bot with blue sparks arcing between its antenna. Smells like ozone.
Sparky.backstory: Was a power strip in a past life. Now channels all that pent-up electricity into combat.

Rustclaw.description: A scrappy junkyard bot with two wrenches and a propeller. Double trouble!
Rustclaw.appearance: Three-armed scrapheap covered in rust. Each arm ends in a different size wrench.
Rustclaw.backstory: Assembled itself from junkyard parts. Nobody taught it to fight — it taught itself.

Firebot.description: A shiny robot with a flame thrower. Everything it touches catches fire!
Firebot.appearance: Red and chrome with flame decals. Twin exhaust pipes glow orange. Leaves scorch marks everywhere.
Firebot.backstory: Former industrial welder who discovered it likes burning things more than welding them.

Smashbot.description: Big fists, tiny brain. Smashes everything in sight. SMASH!
Smashbot.appearance: A squat, wide-shouldered bot with oversized arms and a tiny head. Dented all over from punching walls.
Smashbot.backstory: Programmed for demolition work. Couldn't stop demolishing things, so they put it in the arena.

Voltank.description: A heavily armored tank with a shotgun. Watch out for the blast!
Voltank.appearance: Tank treads for legs, four arms bristling with weapons, a single glowing red eye.
Voltank.backstory: Military prototype gone AWOL. Fights in the arena because it's the only thing that makes it feel alive.

Shredder.description: A sleek bot with a laser gun and a blast shield. Precise and well-protected.
Shredder.appearance: Sleek black chassis with a single precision laser mounted on its shoulder. Moves like a predator.
Shredder.backstory: Originally a surgical robot. Discovered it preferred cutting things that fight back.

Boombox.description: A walking bomb factory. Loves the sound of explosions. KABOOM!
Boombox.appearance: Cuboid body covered in speaker grilles and explosive charges. Bass drops cause shockwaves.
Boombox.backstory: DJ turned demolitions expert. Every fight is a concert and the audience is on fire.

Omega.description: The ultimate fighting machine. Lightsabre goes bzzzzt.
Omega.appearance: Gleaming white and gold armor with a glowing blue lightsabre. Looks like it was built by angels.
Omega.backstory: The champion of the mid-tier arena. Undefeated until you showed up.

Ironclad.description: A fortress on legs. Good luck getting through that armor.
Ironclad.appearance: Walking fortress of riveted titanium plates. So heavily armored it creaks when it moves.
Ironclad.backstory: Built by a paranoid engineer who kept adding more armor. Never enough armor.

Laserface.description: Two laser eyes and perfect aim. Terrifying. Pew pew pew!
Laserface.appearance: Its entire face is two massive laser barrels. No mouth, no nose, just lasers. It sees you and it shoots.
Laserface.backstory: Was designed to be a lighthouse. Turns out pointing two high-powered lasers at boats was a bad idea.

Warblade.description: A relentless melee fighter with a chainsaw and shock rod. No explosives — just raw cutting power.
Warblade.appearance: Scarred titanium chassis with a chainsaw arm and crackling shock rod. Moves with predatory speed. Jet exhaust trails behind.
Warblade.backstory: A gladiator bot that refuses to use ranged weapons. Believes true combat is up close and personal.

Thunderbot.description: Channels lightning through a massive plasma cannon. The ground shakes when it walks.
Thunderbot.appearance: Massive blue-steel frame crackling with arc lightning. Storm clouds form above it indoors.
Thunderbot.backstory: Struck by lightning 47 times. Rather than dying, it learned to channel the storms.

Megacrusher.description: Five arms, two massive weapons, zero mercy. CRUSH!
Megacrusher.appearance: Five arms radiating from a barrel chest. Each arm bigger than a person. Eyes glow with quantum uncertainty.
Megacrusher.backstory: Started as a mining robot. Mined so hard it broke through to the arena and decided to stay.

Doombot.description: Rains missiles from across the arena. When the missiles run out, there's always the chainsaw.
Doombot.appearance: Hovering weapons platform bristling with missile racks. Red targeting lasers sweep the arena constantly.
Doombot.backstory: Decommissioned orbital defense satellite. Downloaded into a robot body. Still thinks it's defending a planet.

Nightmare.description: The stuff bad dreams are made of. Six arms, impossible to dodge, won't stay down.
Nightmare.appearance: Pitch black with six arms, each tipped with a different weapon. Red eyes that never blink. Moves silently.
Nightmare.backstory: Nobody knows who built Nightmare. It appeared one day in the arena and has never left.

Apocalypse.description: A walking nuclear arsenal. Every hit is an extinction event.
Apocalypse.appearance: Towering chrome mech trailing radioactive green smoke. Mushroom cloud logo painted on its chest.
Apocalypse.backstory: Built in a bunker by scientists who wanted to see what would happen. What happened was Apocalypse.

TITAN.description: The final boss. Planet-sized. Galaxy-destroying. Can you even scratch it?
TITAN.appearance: A planet-sized mechanical colossus. Its eyes are twin suns. Entire civilizations live in its joints.
TITAN.backstory: The final creation of an extinct species. Programmed to fight until the heat death of the universe.
